name: Easiest Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and peanut butter together over a double boiler.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the condensed milk.
3. Pour the mixture into an 8 by 8 inch pan lined with wax paper.
4. Refrigerate until chilled.
5. Cut into 1-inch pieces.
Yields 1-1/2 pounds.
